metadata.description: Hook-enforced shared board so parallel Claude Code and opencode agents in one repo stay aware of each other.

plugins.name: huddle
plugins.description: Hook-enforced shared board for parallel Claude Code and opencode agents in the same repo. Siblings see each other's plans and shared-surface changes without a daemon: auto-published on plan approve and on edits to contract surfaces, injected at session start and as they appear.
